narrative:
Tallmadge 2-B (precinct in Summit County) has 1,094 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.6%, a modest Republican lean of 4.9 percentage points.
